# Reconstruction, resampling, and simulation methods <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

## SPRITE

- Sample Parameter Reconstruction via Iterative Techniques

## CLOSURE and Horn's metric

- CLOSURE method
- Horn's metric

## Simulation and bootstrapping

- Simulation/bootstrapping: how likely given values are given a much larger, more trustworthy sample
- Resampling results from data to examine plausibility
- Using within-meta meta-analysis of SDs from the same outcome to examine differences between each sample and the meta-SD

### Caveats

- Although this relies on prior data and the current study may have different selection effects or constraints, the other side of this coin is worth considering
